name: @tupynambalucas/cortex
author: Tupynambá Lucas Varela Rodrigues <tupynambalucas.dev>
description: Tupynambá Lucas Unified AI Cortex Workspace

scripts.cortex:core:reset: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml --profile core down --volumes && docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml --profile core up -d --build
scripts.cortex:mcp:reset: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml --profile mcp down --volumes && docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml --profile mcp up -d --build
scripts.cortex:agents:reset: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml --profile agents down --volumes && docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml --profile agents up -d --build
